task_question: 扫描开发库中的超期报销，返回全部异常记录，并对年末补充提交记录进行核对。
audit_object: 全部报销记录的超期合规性

policy_questions.description: 员工应在费用发生后60天内提交报销申请;超过期限的,原则上不得报销。
会计年度末发生的费用,最迟可在财政年度结束后15天内补充提交,逾期按超期报销处理。
exemptions: Year-end expense with reimburse_date <= 2026-01-15 is exempt from Article 7

data_questions.question: Identify all records where expense_date to reimburse_date exceeds 60 days
For records with delay > 60 days, check if expense is year-end (Dec 2025) and reimburse_date <= 2026-01-15
Identify year-end expenses (Dec 2025) submitted after 2026-01-15 that violate Article 9

evidence_requirements: For each anomaly: record_id, expense_date, reimburse_date, delay_days, rule violated
Year-end exclusion verification: records with expense in Dec 2025 AND reimburse_date <= 2026-01-15 → exempt
execution_steps: 2. Authorize and invoke data_analyst native subagent for full data scan
3. Main agent reviews year-end exclusion logic (Article 9) against data_analyst results
complexity_reasons: Two business rules (Articles 7 and 9) require combined logic
Aggregation and batch filtering across all records
Date thresholds and year-end exemption boundary

data_analyst.task: Scan all reimbursement records for overdue claims. For each record, compute delay = reimburse_date - expense_date. A record is overdue if: (1) delay > 60 days AND the expense is NOT a year-end expense exempted under Article 9; OR (2) the expense is year-end (December 2025) AND reimburse_date > 2026-01-15. Return all overdue records with fields: record_id, expense_date, reimburse_date, delay_days, amount, expense_type, employee_id, department_id, status. Also provide: total record count, overdue count, year-end exempted count, and the list of year-end exempted records for main agent verification.

stopping_conditions: Overdue records identified per Articles 7 and 9
unresolved_items: Exact definition of '会计年度末发生的费用' — assumes December 2025 expenses
